summary: Build-A-Bear has transitioned from a mall-based children's retailer into a diversified, high-margin brand-equity business. Its customer base is now ~40% teens and adults, its non-retail (commercial + international franchising) segments are compounding at >20%, and brand engagement is migrating to digital and social channels. This tracker monitors independent demand signals — search, community, social, digital, and the secondary market — to assess whether adult-driven brand demand is durable and broadening.
convergence: Independent channels — Google search, the Reddit community, Roblox engagement, and secondary-market pricing — are moving in the same direction. Convergence across unrelated platforms distinguishes a structural demand shift from a single-channel fad.
